item.title: Core Services Map
item.description: Core Services Map Summary This note maps the main service roles inside the homelab.

item.title: Homelab Network Topology
item.description: Homelab Network Topology Summary This note explains the network layout behind the lab environment.

item.title: Homelab Concepts
item.description: Summary This section is for the mental models behind the lab environment.

item.title: Homelab
item.description: Summary This section contains notes about my personal lab environment, infrastructure layout, services, and experiments that support security, cloud, and administration learning.

item.title: Detection Validation and Rule Tuning Workflow
item.description: Detection Validation and Rule Tuning Workflow Summary This note describes a simple workflow for validating a detection and tuning it when the result is weak, noisy, or unclear.

item.title: Severity, Escalation, and When To Hand Off
item.description: Severity, Escalation, and When To Hand Off Summary This note explains how to think about alert severity, escalation, and when a case should be handed off rather than held too long.

item.title: Security Guides
item.description: Summary This section is for practical blue-team workflows.

item.title: Security
item.description: Summary This section contains my security notes focused on beginner-friendly blue-team learning, SOC concepts, detection basics, and lab documentation.

item.title: Cloud Workflow Reference
item.description: Cloud Workflow Reference Summary This note is a lightweight reminder of the checks and workflow stages that often support small cloud deployments and operations work.

item.title: Cloud Identity, Service Principals, and Managed Identities
item.description: Cloud Identity, Service Principals, and Managed Identities Summary This note explains the difference between human identity, workload identity, and cloud-managed identity.
